attacks.text: Only 3 cutoffs (100/200/500) may not capture the optimal threshold. Add 300 as intermediate.
kME ranking uses all genes; genes not in turquoise contribute noise to ranking. Acceptable but note in results.
ssGSEA is sample-level; module eigengene is also sample-level. Correlation is meaningful but check for batch effects in both.

qc_checkpoints.name: Gene mapping rate
qc_checkpoints.text: Check >80% of core genes map to Entrez; if lower, enrichment is underpowered

qc_checkpoints.name: GSEA nperm
qc_checkpoints.text: Use nperm=1000 minimum (or fgsea default); report with sample size warning

qc_checkpoints.name: Signed power check
qc_checkpoints.text: If signed power > 10, network may be too sparse; compare module count with unsigned

qc_checkpoints.name: ECM score distribution
qc_checkpoints.text: Check ECM score is not degenerate (all same value); plot histogram before correlation

failure_stop_rules.name: Core too small
failure_stop_rules.text: If top-100 turquoise genes have <50 mapped to Entrez, stop and report insufficient genes

failure_stop_rules.name: GSEA no significant pathways
failure_stop_rules.text: If GSEA finds nothing at FDR<0.25, report honestly; do not lower threshold further

failure_stop_rules.name: Signed network collapses
failure_stop_rules.text: If signed network produces 0-1 modules (grey only), stop; report that unsigned was necessary

attacks.text: 仅 3 个截断（100/200/500）可能未捕获最优阈值。加 300 作为中间值。
kME 排序使用所有基因；不在 turquoise 中的基因为排序贡献噪音。可接受但需在结果中注明。
ssGSEA 是样本级；模块 eigengene 也是样本级。相关有意义但检查两者的批次效应。

qc_checkpoints.name: 基因映射率
qc_checkpoints.text: 检查核心基因 >80% 映射到 Entrez；如果更低，富集效力不足

qc_checkpoints.name: GSEA nperm
qc_checkpoints.text: 用 nperm=1000 最低（或 fgsea 默认）；报告时注明样本量警告

qc_checkpoints.name: Signed power 检查
qc_checkpoints.text: 如果 signed power > 10，网络可能太稀疏；比较 unsigned 的模块数

qc_checkpoints.name: ECM 评分分布
qc_checkpoints.text: 检查 ECM 评分非退化（不全相同）；相关前画直方图

failure_stop_rules.name: 核心太小
failure_stop_rules.text: 如果 turquoise top-100 基因映射到 Entrez 的 <50，停止并报告基因不足

failure_stop_rules.name: GSEA 无显著通路
failure_stop_rules.text: 如果 GSEA 在 FDR<0.25 无结果，诚实报告；不要进一步降低阈值

failure_stop_rules.name: Signed network 崩溃
failure_stop_rules.text: 如果 signed network 只产生 0-1 个模块（仅 grey），停止；报告 unsigned 是必要的
